_comment: Config for our AWIN die cast feed. column_mapping keys are the CSV's source headers; values are the field names the WordPress Affiliate Product Importer expects. Multiple sources may map to the same target as fallbacks (first non-empty wins, in order) — AWIN exports carry the price in either search_price or price depending on export vintage. merchant_category is deliberately NOT mapped: it carries brand names and merchandising labels, not categories — the importer detects product-type from the TITLE instead ([DOC-192] in the importer plugin). Every step can be toggled true/false. See README.md.

seo.opening_template: Discover the {title}, a detailed die cast replica for serious collectors.
seo.closing_template: Add the {title} to your collection today.
